presets.label: The Vault
presets.description: Default — pull from all chests + freighter cargo + ships, organize by category. Comprehensive operational reserves on ships and freighter. Excludes Exosuit + Nomad.

presets.label: Storage Containers Only
presets.description: Reorganize only the 10 storage containers. Ships, freighter, exocrafts, and exosuit completely untouched.

presets.label: Trader Stockpile
presets.description: Same as The Vault but Trade gets two chests: one for commodities, one for high-value tradeables.

presets.label: Cooking Lab
presets.description: Two chests dedicated to cooking: cooked dishes vs ingredients. Trade and Contraband share a chest.

presets.label: Builder's Bench
presets.description: For base-builders: promotes Components into two chests + adds Curios chest. Cooking + Trade combined.

presets.label: Refiner's Den
presets.description: For crafters: 3 chests for components/alloys/reactives. Curios and Trade share a chest.

presets.label: Combat Loadout
presets.description: PvP / Sentinel hunters: heavy ship reserves (extra ammo, repair, shield batteries). Two Tech Module chests.

presets.label: Rookie Setup
presets.description: For new players: targets only chests 1-4 with broad groupings. Higher-numbered chests configured but skipped if not yet built.

presets.label: Pristine
presets.description: Sort items into category order but never consolidate stacks or empty source containers. Most conservative option.
